description: Internal and external link usage conventions plus auto-fix logic.

internal_links.cross_category_exception: ../ allowed for cross-category links (e.g. concepts/ → entities/) as long as target exists under wiki/

external_links.prohibited: [text](raw/**) — never link to raw/. [text](../**) — relative paths prohibited.
external_links.unavailability_check: log broken URLs (404/timeouts) → inform user, do NOT auto-remove

scoring_weights.shared_sources: 2 base + diminishing factor (+1 per additional shared source)
